story.description: A clip of weather, clouds, storms, lightning, snow, or sky phenomena: timelapse of dynamic cloud movements against trees
story.hook: Storm clouds show air layers changing over time.
story.lead: Storm clouds show air layers changing over time. Watch the cloud deck, because winds at different heights can push each layer in a different direction. A timelapse turns that invisible motion into a map. Which sky motion should we read next?
story.script: Storm clouds show air layers changing over time. Watch the cloud deck, because winds at different heights can push each layer in a different direction. A timelapse turns that invisible motion into a map. Which sky motion should we read next?

story.description: A clip of mountains, glaciers, rock layers, erosion, or alpine landscapes: scenic alpine mountain with snow and trees
story.hook: Trees keep weather history in their rings.
story.lead: Trees keep weather history in their rings. Watch the trunk pattern, because each growing season leaves a new layer. Wide rings often mean easier growth, while thin rings can mark stress. That is why an old tree can become a climate diary. Which hidden record should come next?
story.script: Trees keep weather history in their rings. Watch the trunk pattern, because each growing season leaves a new layer. Wide rings often mean easier growth, while thin rings can mark stress. That is why an old tree can become a climate diary. Which hidden record should come next?

story.description: A clip of farm animals: duck enjoying a swim in a muddy puddle
story.hook: Ducks reveal the waterproof feathers first.
story.lead: Ducks reveal the waterproof feathers first. Watch the waterproof feathers first, because ducks spread oil from a gland near the tail. That coating helps water bead away, keeping the body warmer and lighter. The pond looks easy because the feather coat is engineered. Would you test it?.

reasons: script does not expose enough concrete visual detail
opening promise is not concrete enough

story.description: A clip of dogs / puppies: a yorkshire terrier pet dog sitting on the table
story.hook: Dogs can follow a human point fast.
story.lead: Dogs can follow a human point fast. Watch the eyes check the person, because dogs are unusually good at using human gestures. That skill helps them cooperate with us before any command gets repeated. The small glance is social intelligence, not random obedience. What dog skill should come next?

reasons: script does not expose enough concrete visual detail
